side_effects.description: Initial batch (from 'glow') produced severe burning lasting ~12 hours when injected in wrong anatomical location. Newer GHK-Cu from different source with corrected injection site produces less burning.

protocol_notes: User has experience with multiple peptide batches. Notes that 500mg NAD+ vial is actually overfilled to ~700mg and adjusts dosing accordingly. Reports that lower abdomen (between beltline and horizontal line at belly button) produces least burning with GHK-Cu. Warns that GHK-Cu vials are commonly overfilled and actual dose may exceed labeled content.
